concerns.text: FR-001 mandates '1–45 Hz bandpass' and '50/60 Hz line noise removal'. Task T014 describes 'low-frequency bandpass filter' and 'removing /60 Hz line noise' but omits the specific 1 Hz high-pass cutoff and the 50 Hz removal option, leaving the 50 Hz requirement unimplemented.

SC-005 requires verifying 'non-zero, stable power values' across subjects. Tasks T026 and T031 only address mathematical division-by-zero protection (epsilon) and missing sensor flags, lacking a task to explicitly measure and report the stability/non-zero nature of the extracted power values as a validation step.

Plan Phase 2 and SC-002 require memory safety during feature extraction. While T006 covers chunked loading for the data loader, there is no task explicitly implementing chunked loading or memory-safe iteration for the PSD computation in `code/features/extract.py` (T023/T024) to ensure the full dataset fits in RAM during feature extraction.

FR-005 and FR-006 require 'subject-wise 5-fold cross-validation' and a 'held-out test set'. Tasks T035 and T036 describe 'subject-wise k-fold' and 'dynamic split size' but do not explicitly enforce the 5-fold constraint or define the mechanism to ensure a distinct, non-overlapping held-out test set, risking data leakage.

T029 mandates regressing out 'stimulus complexity metrics' as a core step. The spec's Edge Cases and SC-005 do not explicitly authorize this regression as a mandatory blocking condition for the 'Cognitive Load Proxy' definition; this appears to be scope creep from the plan not authorized by the spec.

T007 implements a 'manifest.yaml generator' but does not explicitly state it will fetch or verify dataset URL, version, and checksums from the source, potentially violating Constitution Principle VI (Public Dataset Integrity) if the generation logic isn't strictly automated.
